name: gq-code-harness
description: Engineering harness for Codex and Claude Code: project checks, lifecycle hooks, single-file task flow, bootstrap drafting, and index maintenance.

interface.shortDescription: Hard checks and task lifecycle guardrails for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex-native skill entrypoints while preserving the existing Claude Code plugin layout. Includes project scaffolding, task lifecycle commands, contract checks, override flow, and lifecycle hooks.
defaultPrompt: Use gq-code-harness to create a task.
Use gq-code-harness to archive completed work.
Use gq-code-harness to bootstrap this repo.
